creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
The current port is broken because of incompatibility between the pre6 and
release versions of musicbrainz API.
The new version of freeamp compiles cleanly, but doesn't work.
I'm not using it anymore anyway.

Please either:
- mark the port broken 
- revert to pre6 version of musicbrainz port.

and remove me as a maintainer.

Thanks.

Fix: 

none.
